payload.label: couch
payload.long_description: Dark brown/black leather three-seat reclining-style couch with high segmented padded backrests, stitched vertical seams and quilted seat panels; padded armrests with a visible right-side arm panel (possible cupholder), slight glossy leather sheen and minor creasing; left side of the couch is partially edge-cropped in the image; approximately 2.0 meters from the camera.
